headline: Shares of companies in the broader industrial space are trading higher amid overall market strength as stocks rebound following recent weakness. Stocks have been highly volatile following the Fed's recent rate hike.

headline: APA Corp (NASDAQ:APA) Forms Tight Consolidation with Favorable Risk/Reward Setup for a Potential Breakout
